{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "ICT / Electronic Engineer",
  "description": "Luxsit Integration Limited is a smart home solution company located in the heart of Lagos.Our main focus is to bring people and technology together. We handle all aspects of your technology project including design, scheduling, project management, installation, and service and support. We are a customer service-oriented company and strive for complete customer satisfaction. With our experienced and trained dedicated team of tech experts, bringing your dreams to reality. At Luxsit integration &ndash; whether the project is new construction or retrofit, we integrate seamlessly with all involved to deliver custom, lifestyle inspired solutions across the spectrum of automation, audio/video, cinema rooms, lighting, climate, and security.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: ICT / Electronic Engineer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Integration and Testing of SDN products on Network/E2E level
	Support of the SDN Customer Engagement activities
	Drive Continuous Improvements of SDN Products and Processes
	Systems Integration and Verification tasks during service delivery in the area of different technologies like GSM, GPRS, WCDMA, IMS, LTE and VoLTE, cloud incl
	Scope identification and project coordination
	ICT/telecom system design as per Standards TIA/EIA, BS, BICSI
	End to end design for ELV systems like IP CCTV, Access control, PAVA
	ICT/telecom/ELV specifications drafting, schedules and sizing calculations
	Developing suitable network schematics and further detailing
	BIM modelling coordination, Naviswork design review skills.


IT Support job duties include:


	Resolving IT support requests from employees
	Answering employee questions regarding computer systems
	Gathering and analyzing data to diagnose problems with computer systems
	Changing configurations, settings and permissions to fix computer issues
	Generating sign ins for new hires during the onboarding process.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess an HND / Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree with 2 - 5 years of experience.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified canddiates should send their applications to:&nbsp;hr@luxsitintegration.com&nbsp;or&nbsp;lillian.owoseni@luxsitintegration.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-17",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Luxsit Integration"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "197581"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 0,
      "maxValue": 0,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



ICT / Electronic Engineer Job at Luxsit Integration Limited




        
    

        
        Luxsit Integration Limited is a smart home solution company located in the heart of Lagos.Our main focus is to bring people and technology together. We handle all aspects of your technology project including design, scheduling, project management, installation, and service and support. We are a customer service-oriented company and strive for complete customer satisfaction. With our experienced and trained dedicated team of tech experts, bringing your dreams to reality. At Luxsit integration – whether the project is new construction or retrofit, we integrate seamlessly with all involved to deliver custom, lifestyle inspired solutions across the spectrum of automation, audio/video, cinema rooms, lighting, climate, and security.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: ICT / Electronic Engineer

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Integration and Testing of SDN products on Network/E2E level
	Support of the SDN Customer Engagement activities
	Drive Continuous Improvements of SDN Products and Processes
	Systems Integration and Verification tasks during service delivery in the area of different technologies like GSM, GPRS, WCDMA, IMS, LTE and VoLTE, cloud incl
	Scope identification and project coordination
	ICT/telecom system design as per Standards TIA/EIA, BS, BICSI
	End to end design for ELV systems like IP CCTV, Access control, PAVA
	ICT/telecom/ELV specifications drafting, schedules and sizing calculations
	Developing suitable network schematics and further detailing
	BIM modelling coordination, Naviswork design review skills.


IT Support job duties include:


	Resolving IT support requests from employees
	Answering employee questions regarding computer systems
	Gathering and analyzing data to diagnose problems with computer systems
	Changing configurations, settings and permissions to fix computer issues
	Generating sign ins for new hires during the onboarding process.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess an HND / Bachelor’s Degree with 2 - 5 years of experience.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified canddiates should send their applications to: [email protected] or [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Social Media Support Staff",
  "description": "Stee Cambridge College is a school driven to educate and develop individuals who are RICE (Responsible, Innovative, Confident &amp; Engaging), able to navigate life with confidence, academic prowess and entrepreneurial skills; seeking always to generate solutions to create a healthy and harmonious society, and learning everyday to become commanders and captains of industries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Support Staff

Job Location:&nbsp;Okota, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description&nbsp;


	We are seeking a creative and tech-savvy Social media Support Staff to manage and enhance our school&#39;s online presence.
	The successful candidate will develop and implement social media strategies to engage students, parents and broader community.


Responsibilities


	Social media management
	Content creation
	Brand consistency
	Analytics and Reporting
	Community Engagement
	Collaboration and Team work.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Application and CV&nbsp;to:&nbsp;steecambridgehr@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Social Media Support Staff Job at Stee Cambridge College




        
    

        
        Stee Cambridge College is a school driven to educate and develop individuals who are RICE (Responsible, Innovative, Confident & Engaging), able to navigate life with confidence, academic prowess and entrepreneurial skills; seeking always to generate solutions to create a healthy and harmonious society, and learning everyday to become commanders and captains of industries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Support Staff

Job Location: Okota, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a creative and tech-savvy Social media Support Staff to manage and enhance our school's online presence.
	The successful candidate will develop and implement social media strategies to engage students, parents and broader community.


Responsibilities


	Social media management
	Content creation
	Brand consistency
	Analytics and Reporting
	Community Engagement
	Collaboration and Team work.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Application and CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
